channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Korneuburg
item.description: Due to an switch fault train journeys in Korneuburg station are currently only limited. [Since 30.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to an switch fault train journeys in Korneuburg station are currently only limited.
[Since 30.05.2026]

item.title: 60: Impurity
item.description: delays towards Westbahnhof S U. Reason: Impurity. [On 30.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
delays towards Westbahnhof S U. Reason: Impurity.
[On 30.05.2026]

item.title: U3: delays
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective vehicle. [On 30.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective vehicle.
[On 30.05.2026]

item.title: 6: foreign traffic accident
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 30.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 30.05.2026]

item.title: 18: foreign traffic accident
item.description: After an service obstruction there are different intervals. [On 30.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
After an service obstruction there are different intervals.
[On 30.05.2026]

item.title: 26A: traffic congestion
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic congestion. [On 30.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic congestion.
[On 30.05.2026]

item.title: Wien Hetzendorf ↔ Wien Atzgersdorf
item.description: Due to damage to the track between Wien Hetzendorf Bahnhst and Wien Atzgersdorf Bahnhst train journeys to expected 15:00 are only possible with limited effect. [Since 30.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to damage to the track between Wien Hetzendorf Bahnhst and Wien Atzgersdorf Bahnhst train journeys to expected 15:00 are only possible with limited effect.
[Since 30.05.2026]

item.title: 95A: signal disruption
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: signal disruption. [On 30.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: signal disruption.
[On 30.05.2026]

item.title: 43: track construction works
item.description: Due to track construction works in Dornbacher Straße, the following change is made to the 43 line. [Since 20.04.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to track construction works in Dornbacher Straße, the following change is made to the 43 line.
[Since 20.04.2026]

item.title: 11/71: track construction works
item.description: Due to track construction works in the Simmeringer Hauptstraße, short guided tours take place in the evenings from Monday to Friday on the line 11 and 71 (22:30-01:00). … [03.03.2026 – 27.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to track construction works in the Simmeringer Hauptstraße, short guided tours take place in the evenings from Monday to Friday on the line 11 and 71 (22:30-01:00). …
[03.03.2026 – 27.06.2026]
